periods.label: Q1 2026
periods.summary: Platform foundation: lab orchestration, scenario engine, and unified learning workspace for autonomous practice.

items.name: Lab Orchestration
items.description: Unified layer for managing lab environments: start, stop, reset, and lifecycle control without instructor intervention.

items.name: Scenario and Learning Steps Engine
items.description: Step-by-step scenario system with checkpoints, execution logic, completion conditions, and action validation.

items.name: Personal Learning Workspace
items.description: Learner interface with goals, materials, hints, artifacts, and overall practice progress tracking.

items.name: Environment Reset to Known State
items.description: Quickly restore lab environment to reference configuration after errors, experiments, or incomplete scenarios.

items.name: Checkpoints and Save Points
items.description: Intermediate state saving mechanism to continue long exercises without replaying all stages.

items.name: Basic Attempt and Time Telemetry
items.description: Collection of execution time, attempt count, freezes, and common errors for subsequent scenario efficiency analysis.

periods.label: Q2 2026
periods.summary: Focus on adaptivity: personalized learning paths, automatic session review, and multi-level hint system.

items.name: Adaptive Learning Paths
items.description: Automatic adjustment of learning route based on user strengths, weaknesses, pace, and accumulated results.

items.name: Automatic Session Review
items.description: Summary of user actions after scenario completion: errors, missed steps, successful solutions, and improvement recommendations.

items.name: Multi-level Hints
items.description: Flexible hint system with multiple detail levels: from light guidance to nearly complete solution explanation.

items.name: Skill Gap Detection
items.description: Automatic identification of topics and competencies where the user experiences the most difficulty during practice.

items.name: Dynamic Difficulty Adjustment
items.description: Adaptation of task difficulty based on progress and completion quality to maintain optimal challenge level.

periods.label: Q3 2026
periods.summary: Focus on scale: content factory, skills matrix, and multi-tenancy for independent learning programs.

items.name: Scenario Content Factory
items.description: Environment for creating, editing, validating, and versioning learning scenarios and practical exercises.

items.name: Skills Matrix and Coverage
items.description: Mapping scenarios to specific skills and knowledge areas to track curriculum coverage and identify gaps.

items.name: Multi-tenancy
items.description: Support for isolated spaces for different teams, customers, or learning cohorts with their own configuration.

items.name: Scenario Versioning
items.description: Storage and release of multiple versions of the same scenario for different difficulty levels, cohorts, and curriculum editions.

items.name: Content Review and Publication
items.description: Process for approval, review, and safe publication of new scenarios and changes to existing practical exercises.

periods.label: Q4 2026
periods.summary: Focus on integrations and analytics: LMS, API, telemetry export, and executive skills reporting.

items.name: LMS Integrations
items.description: Integration with external learning management systems for transferring statuses, assignments, results, and learning analytics.

items.name: Public API
items.description: Programmatic interface for integrating PT EdTechLab with external platforms, portals, and internal company services.

items.name: Telemetry Export
items.description: Export of events and completion metrics to external analytics and management systems.

items.name: Executive Reporting
items.description: Reports and dashboards for managers showing skill mastery levels, learning dynamics, and problem areas.

items.name: SSO and Unified Identity
items.description: Single authentication and linked user profile for seamless operation between PT EdTechLab and corporate ecosystem.
